scripts.dev: concurrently --names sidecar,ts --prefix-colors cyan,yellow "cd sidecar && .venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --reload" "tsx watch src/main.ts"
scripts.service:install: mkdir -p logs && ln -sf "$(pwd)/scripts/com.idotmatrix.weather.plist" ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.idotmatrix.weather.plist && launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.idotmatrix.weather.plist && echo 'Service installed and started.'
